basic_details.job_title: AMU Aligarh Manpower Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Aligarh Muslim University (AMU Aligarh) has officially announced the Manpower (Skilled) Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification has been published on the official AMU website. Candidates aged between 18 and 25 years and holding SSC/ High School, ITI, or a higher qualification in the relevant field can submit their offline applications on or before 01 August 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application form are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 25 years Age relaxation may be granted to candidates already working in Aligarh Muslim University, Aligarh.

qualification.education_qualification: SSC/High School, ITI or higher qualification in the relevant field
qualification.details: SSC/High School and ITI or higher qualification in the relevant field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AMU Aligarh Manpower (Skilled) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AMU Aligarh Manpower (Skilled) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AMU Aligarh Manpower Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AMU Aligarh Manpower (Skilled) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Manpower (Skilled) posts at Aligarh Muslim University Aligarh is 01 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Manpower (Skilled) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Manpower (Skilled) position announced by Aligarh Muslim University Aligarh.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Manpower (Skilled) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed SSC/High School and possess an ITI or a higher qualification in the relevant field to be eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Manpower (Skilled) recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for this recruitment is between 18 years and 25 years. Age relaxation may be provided to internal candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Manpower (Skilled) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Manpower (Skilled) posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Manpower (Skilled) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve application screening, followed by an interview and a practical test.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 01/ED (WM)/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
